programme.title: Life At Vet U: Extra Credit

programme.title: Wildlife SOS
programme.desc: It's time for the badgers' release into the wild, and the team, especially Sara, are feeling the sadness around letting them go.

programme.title: Going Ape
programme.desc: It's six weeks since new chimp mum Yao and her baby, Miko, escaped from their sanctuary. When they're finally caught, it all goes wrong for Miko.

programme.title: Going Ape
programme.desc: Baby gorilla Shufai makes it back to the forest after his operation and for the first time since his mother's murder, he meets another gorilla.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People
programme.desc: As new predators encroach on the ranch, the Browns devise inventive solutions to defend their livestock. Gabe's long-distance girlfriend makes her first visit.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People
programme.desc: A medical emergency on the Wolfpack's ranch forces them to be more resourceful; Gabe's family are concerned when he makes a hasty leap towards marriage.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People
programme.desc: As the first snow falls, the Browns make a risky attempt to move their shelters closer to the barn. Noah prepares his pregnant wife Rhain for her first bush winter.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People
programme.desc: The Wolfpack kids have divided their land between themselves. They're keen to finish building their houses in time as Noah prepares for the baby's arrival.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer
programme.sub-title: How New Magnets Could Power the Future
programme.desc: Scientists develop powerful magnets to enable clean energy sources like fusion. But China's dominance of the supply chain for rare-earth magnets threatens their global availability.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer
programme.sub-title: Can Living Human Brain Cells Power AI?

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer
programme.sub-title: The Big Business of Drilling Deep Into the Earth
programme.desc: Geothermal has been the underdog of the energy industry, but that may be about to change as new startups use fracking technologies to expand potential geothermal sites.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer
programme.sub-title: Why Money Is Flowing Into Geoengineering
programme.desc: Scientists and entrepreneurs test radical ideas like solar radiation management and ocean fertilisation and try to find funding for it.

programme.title: CSI: Cyber
programme.desc: The cyber team investigates the abductions of young women whose social network pages are being kept up to date. Also, Ryan helps Trish McCarthy cope with the death of Trish's sister, Ryan's former psych patient.

programme.title: CSI: Cyber
programme.desc: The cyber crime team investigates when nine planes that departed from the same airport face a co-ordinated wi-fi attack while in flight.

programme.title: CSI: Cyber
programme.desc: Special Agent Avery Ryan and her team investigate when a man dies after taking medication he purchased from a hacked ad on a medical website.

programme.title: CSI: Cyber
programme.desc: Avery and her team investigate when a 15-year-old boy is accidentally killed with the gun he got from an online video game. The Cyber Division believes Trigger is back.

programme.title: CSI: Cyber
programme.desc: The cyber team investigates when a hacker creates a power outage in Detroit to mask a jewellery store robbery-homicide in which gems weren't the target.

programme.title: CSI: Cyber
programme.desc: Avery confronts the hacker who released her patients' information when she was a psychologist, and Krumitz confronts the man who murdered his parents.

programme.title: CSI: Cyber
programme.desc: DB Russell joins the team as the new director of Next Generation Forensics while they investigate a case of burglary and homicide committed by someone who hacked the home's security system.

programme.title: CSI: Cyber
programme.desc: Raven sets out to prove a friend's innocence in the murder of a man she met through a dating app.

programme.title: CSI: Cyber
programme.desc: The team tries to find the person who hacked a police officer's body camera and made the incendiary video go viral.

programme.title: CSI: Cyber
programme.desc: The team investigates a child abduction case inspired by a myth where an abductor lures children through a cell phone app.

programme.title: CSI: Cyber
programme.desc: A hacker has taken control of all network medical devices at a hospital in Dallas and threatens to kill one patient every hour if his demands are not met.

programme.title: CSI: Cyber
programme.desc: Avery and the team track down a hacker who is cyber-jacking vehicles and using them as remote-controlled cars to cause deadly crashes.

programme.title: CSI: Cyber
programme.desc: When a woman is murdered during a video chat with her parents, Avery's skills are put to the test as she interviews the only other witness, an agoraphobic neighbour with PTSD from the incident.

programme.title: CSI: Cyber
programme.desc: Avery risks her life to capture the no.1 criminal on the FBI Cyber's Most Wanted List who murdered her friend, an Interpol agent.

programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a hacker who was hired to delete an assault victim's comments from a confessional website.

programme.title: Uncle Buck
programme.desc: An idle, good-natured bachelor, Uncle Buck is the last person you would think of to watch the kids. However, during a family crisis, he is suddenly left in charge of his nephew and nieces.

programme.title: Ghostbusters
programme.desc: A trio of university parapsychologists decide to open their own business called Ghostbusters, and almost at once are summoned to investigate the strange happenings in a Central Park West apartment.

programme.title: Major League
programme.desc: The new owner of the Cleveland Indians puts together a team of misfits so they'll lose and she can move them to Miami. When they uncover the plot, they decide to teach her a lesson and start winning.

programme.title: The Hunt for Red October
programme.desc: A Russian submarine commander attempts to defect to the US, bringing both sides to the brink of war.

programme.title: Brewster's Millions
programme.desc: Montgomery Brewster is a minor league baseball pitcher who discovers he has to blow $30 million in 30 days as a condition to inherit a much greater fortune.

programme.title: Apollo 13
programme.desc: Houston, we have a problem - a fuel leak that threatens to doom three astronauts in space during NASA's 1970 moon mission.

programme.title: Back to the Future
programme.desc: Marty, a typical teen, is accidentally sent back to 1955 in a plutonium-powered time machine. Marty must make sure his teenage parents-to-be meet and fall in love so he can get back to the future.

programme.title: Scream 2
programme.desc: Two years after the tragic events that plagued Sidney she's moved to college putting the shocking killings behind her. That is until a copycat killer begins acting out a real-life sequel.

programme.title: Repo Man
programme.desc: A young punk recruited by a car repossession agency finds himself in pursuit of a Chevrolet Malibu that is wanted for a $20,000 bounty and has something otherworldly stashed in its trunk.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop
programme.desc: An ultra-cool, fresh out of Detroit, foul-mouthed detective is treading on toes in Beverly Hills as he zeroes in on the scum who killed his friend.

programme.title: Coming to America
programme.desc: Join an African prince on an unforgettable comic quest to the New World, as it's time for him to find a princess.

programme.desc: Hunker down as an icy October surprise complicates the race to the finish line.

programme.title: Volcanic Odysseys
programme.desc: Travel to some of the most remote and rarely visited volcanoes in Indonesia.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Asia Insight
programme.desc: Once considered worthless, bamboo is in the spotlight in Indonesia. One NGO is using it to improve the environment and local livelihoods. It's also playing a role revitalizing a local village.

programme.title: Newsroom Tokyo
programme.desc: NEWSROOM TOKYO dives deeper into the day's news with insight and analysis, from the perspective of Japan and the rest of Asia. We put a spotlight on what you need to know to understand the issues.

programme.title: Direct Talk
programme.desc: Direct and in-depth. Interviews exploring the minds and motivations of the leaders, visionaries, artists and entrepreneurs who are changing our world.

programme.title: Impacts: Climates Change the World
programme.desc: The entire Earth is affected by climate change, occurring with a greater speed and scale than ever before. This program uses scientific data and the latest findings to raise awareness on its impact.

programme.title: Ukiyoe EDO-LIFE
programme.desc: Centuries ago, Tokyo was known as EDO. More than a million people enjoyed life in this city, they live on in ukiyo-e woodblock prints. Take a deep dive into ukiyo-e and explore the soul of old Tokyo.

programme.title: Medical Frontiers
programme.desc: From prevention to cure! The groundbreaking world of Japanese medical technology and healthcare. For your healthy lifestyle, this program shows tips of superfoods and easy exercises.

programme.desc: A wide range of topics featuring Japanese culture and society are introduced.

programme.title: Deliver Us
programme.desc: When a nun in a remote convent claims immaculate conception, priests investigate, concerned she will give birth to twin boys: one the Messiah, the other the Anti-Christ.

programme.title: Psycho Goreman
programme.desc: In this light-hearted yet violent cosmic, comedy adventure, an intergalactic warlord becomes enslaved to a pair of Earth children after they unwittingly resurrect him.

programme.title: What Lies Below
programme.desc: A 16-year-old girl returns home from camp and learns her mother has a new boyfriend, one she intends to marry; a man whose charm, intelligence and beauty make him look like he's not human at all.

programme.title: Dark Diamond
programme.desc: After his father's death, a man vows vengeance against the relatives who abandoned him.

programme.title: A Bittersweet Life
programme.desc: A gangster starts a violent feud after he refuses to kill his boss's cheating girlfriend.

programme.title: The Crying Game
programme.desc: A reluctant IRA agent discovers that some people just aren't who you expect them to be.

programme.title: Come To Daddy
programme.desc: Norval, a privileged man-child travels to the beautiful and remote cabin of his estranged father, in order to reconnect with him as he hasn't seen him in 30 years.

programme.title: God is a Bullet
programme.desc: After his ex-wife is murdered and his daughter is kidnapped, Bob Hightower, infiltrates the group to hunt down their leader with the help of the cult's only female victim escapee.

programme.title: Final Cut
programme.desc: Life imitates art when the cast and crew of a low-budget zombie flick start to turn into the living dead.

programme.title: Vivarium
programme.desc: A young couple looking for the perfect home find themselves trapped in a mysterious labyrinth-like neighbourhood of identical houses.

programme.title: Pusher 2: With Blood on My Hands
programme.desc: In part two of Danish director Nicolas Winding Refn's crime trilogy, Mads Mikkelsen plays Tonny, a criminal at the mercy of his cold-hearted gangster father.

programme.title: Caligula: The Ultimate Cut
programme.desc: Excess, violence and corruption mark the notorious emperor's reign in first-century Rome.

programme.title: The Collector
programme.desc: As the seconds tick down to midnight, an ex-con becomes a reluctant hero trapped by a masked "Collector" in a maze of lethal invention while trying to rescue the very family he came to rob.

programme.title: The Collection
programme.desc: The survivor (Josh Stewart) of a madman's torture chamber leads a team of mercenaries back to the same booby-trapped lair to rescue a captive woman (Emma Fitzpatrick).

programme.title: The Collection
programme.desc: The survivor (Josh Stewart) of a madman's torture chamber leads a team of mercenaries back to the same booby-trapped lair to rescue a captive woman (Emma Fitzpatrick).

programme.title: The Chaser
programme.desc: A cop investigates the disappearance of several call girls he pimps out.

programme.title: Vesper
programme.desc: Struggling to survive with her father after the collapse of Earth's ecosystem, 13-year-old Vesper must use her wits, strength and bio-hacking abilities to fight for the future.

programme.title: The Raid
programme.desc: A SWAT team is trapped in a tenement run by a ruthless mobster and his army of killers and thugs. Stranded on the sixth floor, they must fight their way through the city's worst to survive.

programme.title: District B13: Ultimatum
programme.desc: Explosive sequel set in a futuristic Paris. Corrupt cops conspire to launch a nuclear strike and take over a ghetto terrorised by marauding drug gangs and killers. Subtitles.

programme.title: G.I. Samurai
programme.desc: A squadron of Japanese Self-Defence Force soldiers find themselves transported through time to their country's warring states era, when rival samurai clans were battling to become the supreme Shogun.

programme.title: The Stunt man
programme.desc: A fugitive stumbles onto a movie set just when they need a new stunt man, takes the job as a way to hide out and falls for the leading lady while facing off with his manipulative director.

programme.title: The Thicket
programme.desc: When a bounty hunter and a band of unlikely heroes pursue a brutal killer, they find themselves in a deadly no-man's-land known as the Thicket.

programme.title: Coming Home In The Dark
programme.desc: A school teacher is forced to confront a brutal act from his past when a pair of ruthless drifters takes him and his family on a nightmare road-trip.

programme.title: Pusher 3: I'm The Angel of Death
programme.desc: This bloody and captivating film completes Danish director Nicolas Winding Refn's crime trilogy. Copenhagen's biggest kingpin must rethink his status when a younger crowd rolls in.

programme.title: Hardware
programme.desc: In an America ravaged by atomic warfare, nomads spend their days scavenging for scrap. That's how an ex-soldier acquires spare android parts, which turn into a robot programmed to destroy humans.

programme.title: Hell House LLC
programme.desc: Five years after 15 people were killed during a haunted house tour, a documentary crew visits the scene to investigate what really happened.

programme.title: Hell House LLC II: The Abbadon Hotel
programme.desc: Eight years after a hotel's tragic opening, an investigative journalist is convinced key evidence remains in the abandoned hotel.

programme.title: Hell House LLC III: Lake Of Fire
programme.desc: The Abaddon Hotel will once again be open to the public. Russell Wynn has taken his audience-interactive show, Insomnia, into the abandoned hotel that is rumored to be haunted.

programme.title: Hell House LLC III: Lake Of Fire
programme.desc: The Abaddon Hotel will once again be open to the public. Russell Wynn has taken his audience-interactive show, Insomnia, into the abandoned hotel that is rumored to be haunted.

programme.title: To Catch A Killer: Part 1
programme.desc: As he investigates the missing person report of a teenager, detective Kozenczak becomes concerned that local businessman John Wayne Gacy may be responsible. However, their evidence is circumstantial.

programme.title: Dobermann
programme.desc: The Dobermann and his gang have been hitting the headlines. Banks, post-offices, bullion vans! The whole works! An anthology of robbery, a compilation of hold-ups!

programme.title: Police Story
programme.desc: A kung-fu policeman (Jackie Chan) must protect a female witness (Brigitte Lin) from a Hong Kong drug lord for whom she used to work.

programme.title: Police Story 2
programme.desc: A Hong Kong cop's unusual policing methods result in his demotion to traffic duty, despite his success in fighting crime. Meanwhile, an old enemy is released from prison and sets out to get revenge.

programme.title: Police Story 3: Super Cop
programme.desc: A Hong Kong detective teams up with his female Red Chinese counterpart to stop a Chinese drug czar.

programme.title: Under The Silver Lake
programme.desc: Sam, a disenchanted 33-year-old finds a mysterious woman in his apartment's pool. When she vanishes, he embarks on a quest across LA, leading him down a path of mystery.

programme.title: I Saw The Devil
programme.desc: The line between good and evil begins to blur when a special agent goes on the hunt for a serial killer who brutally murdered his pregnant fiancee.

programme.title: Arctic
programme.desc: Sole-survivor of a plane crash, and stranded deep within the Arctic Circle, Overgard is waiting to be rescued, when a sudden turn of events finds him no longer on his own.

programme.title: Memento
programme.desc: A story told both forwards and backwards in time about an ex- insurance investigator, unable to remember new thoughts, who uses notes and tattoos to hunt for the man he thinks killed his wife.

programme.title: Shutter
programme.desc: Late one night on a country road, Tun and Jane accidentally run over a mysterious pedestrian. Fleeing the scene, they return to their lives in Bangkok, but soon discover things have changed.

programme.title: Children of the Corn II: Final Sacrifice
programme.desc: When the mutilated bodies of adults are found in Nebraska no one believes that the killers could be children hiding in the cornfields. A journalist covering the story delves into the truth.

programme.title: Timecrimes
programme.desc: A man accidentally gets into a time machine and travels back in time nearly an hour. Finding himself will be the first of a series of disasters of unforeseeable consequences.

programme.title: Timecrimes
programme.desc: A man accidentally gets into a time machine and travels back in time nearly an hour. Finding himself will be the first of a series of disasters of unforeseeable consequences.

programme.title: Audition
programme.desc: A widower accepts his friend's offer to audition girls in order to search for his new wife. However, the girl he likes does not appear to be the one she claims to be.

programme.title: All Hallows' Eve
programme.desc: On Halloween, a babysitter finds an old VHS tape in the kids' trick or treat bag. The tape features three tales of terror, all linked together by a murderous clown.

programme.title: Top Knot Detective
programme.desc: Takashi Takamoto begins writing jingles for a well-known Japanese company and ends up creating a bloody series of samurai action that, over time, becomes a cult series.

programme.title: Severance
programme.desc: A bonding weekend goes horribly wrong for seven colleagues who find themselves facing the chop when they are sabotaged by a deadly enemy. Only the smartest will survive this brutal office outing.

programme.title: Day of the Dead
programme.desc: The flesh-eating undead have wiped out every last vestige of the civilised world. Deep underground, a group of scientists and soldiers work to find a cure for the unstoppable plague.

programme.title: Oasis
programme.desc: An irresponsible and childish ex-con befriends a girl with cerebral palsy and develops a progressively stronger bond with her.

programme.title: Thesis
programme.desc: A Spanish film student (Ana Torrent) finds a videotape showing the torture and murder of a missing coed.

programme.title: The Hit
programme.desc: A hit man is sent to Spain to kidnap an ex-criminal and transport him to Paris for execution.

programme.title: G.I. Samurai
programme.desc: A squadron of Japanese Self-Defence Force soldiers find themselves transported through time to their country's warring states era, when rival samurai clans were battling to become the supreme Shogun.

programme.title: Apex
programme.desc: A group of elite hunters pay to hunt down a man on a deserted island, only to find themselves becoming the prey.

programme.title: Winnie The Pooh: Blood And Honey 2
programme.desc: Not wanting to live in the shadows any longer, Winnie-the-Pooh, Piglet, Owl and Tigger take their fight to the town of Ashdown, leaving a bloody trail of death and mayhem in their wake.

programme.title: The Hitcher
programme.desc: A young man who escapes the clutches of a murderous hitchhiker is subsequently stalked by the hitcher and framed for his crimes.

programme.title: I Spit On Your Grave
programme.desc: An aspiring writer is sexually abused and left for dead by four men. She systematically hunts them down to seek revenge, inflicting upon them every horrifying and torturous moment they carried out on her.

programme.title: Open Your Eyes
programme.desc: A very handsome gentleman finds the love of his life, but suffers an accident and needs to have his face reconstructed through surgery after being severely disfigured.

programme.title: Open Your Eyes
programme.desc: A very handsome gentleman finds the love of his life, but suffers an accident and needs to have his face reconstructed through surgery after being severely disfigured.

programme.title: Reunion
programme.desc: When pregnant Ellie returns to her childhood home to complete a book, she's reunited with her mother. Consumed by dark memories of the house, she ends up unearthing a horrifying reality.

programme.title: Cops vs Thugs
programme.desc: A dirty cop is forced to choose between the police and his yakuza buddies when a new boss arrives in his precinct.

programme.title: Vivarium
programme.desc: A young couple looking for the perfect home find themselves trapped in a mysterious labyrinth-like neighbourhood of identical houses.

programme.title: The Wild Goose Lake
programme.desc: On the run, gangster Zhou connects with sex worker Liu Aiai who was instructed to bring him in.

programme.title: To Catch A Killer: Part 1
programme.desc: As he investigates the missing person report of a teenager, detective Kozenczak becomes concerned that local businessman John Wayne Gacy may be responsible. However, their evidence is circumstantial.

programme.title: Hardware
programme.desc: In an America ravaged by atomic warfare, nomads spend their days scavenging for scrap. That's how an ex-soldier acquires spare android parts, which turn into a robot programmed to destroy humans.

programme.title: Lars and the Real Girl
programme.desc: Lars is content with his artificial girlfriend: a life-sized doll named Bianca. When he develops feelings for an attractive co-worker, Lars finds himself lost in a unique love triangle.

programme.title: Caligula: The Ultimate Cut
programme.desc: Excess, violence and corruption mark the notorious emperor's reign in first-century Rome.

programme.title: Showgirls
programme.desc: Nomi Malone has what it takes to make it as a Las Vegas showgirl - what she doesn't have is a way in. To survive, she accepts the only job available, lap dancing at a seedy club.

programme.title: You Don't Nomi
programme.desc: Trace Paul Verhoeven's Showgirls' redemptive journey from notorious flop to cult classic, and maybe even masterpiece.

programme.title: Sasquatch Sunset
programme.desc: In the misty forests of North America, a family of Sasquatches find themselves on a collision course with the ever-changing world around them.

programme.title: Crabs!
programme.desc: In the middle of prom night, a swarm of murderous crabs descends upon a small coastal town.

programme.title: Deliver Us

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and Jamie are thrown together in marriage, but as their emotional and physical relationship unfolds, deeper feelings arise. Claire is ultimately torn between two men in two very different times.

programme.title: Men in Kilts
programme.desc: For Sam and Graham's final adventure, the duo have a bath in hell, roll down mountains, and get a new makeover.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: While on her second honeymoon, World War II nurse Claire Randall is mysteriously transported back in time to 1743 Scotland where she is kidnapped by a group of Highlanders and meets a young man named Jamie.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire is taken to Castle Leoch, where she meets the Laird. As suspicions about her identity run high, Claire tries to blend in, and befriends the mysterious Geillis Duncan.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: As Castle Leoch is readied for a gathering of the MacKenzie clan, Claire attempts to treat a young poisoning victim, placing her at odds with a powerful priest who demands to perform an exorcism.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: As Claire lays plans to escape during the Gathering, the rivalry between Jamie and Dougal intensifies.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: As she accompanies Dougal on a trip to collect the rents owed to the MacKenzies laird, Claire witnesses brutality on both sides of the conflict between the Scottish rebels and the British royal army.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: As Claire and Dougal are brought in for questioning by a royal army commander, they come face to face with the sadistic Black Jack Randall.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and Jamie are thrown together in marriage, but as their emotional and physical relationship unfolds, deeper feelings arise. Claire is ultimately torn between two men in two very different times.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Frank desperately searches for his missing wife, while Claire tries to come to terms with her new marriage. Claire is faced with an emotional quandary as a life-altering opportunity presents itself.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie and the Highlanders rescue Claire from Black Jack Randall. Back at the castle, politics threaten to tear Clan MacKenzie apart and Jamie's scorned lover, Laoghaire, attempts to win him back.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.sub-title: By The Pricking Of My Thumbs
programme.desc: Jamie hopes the newly arrived Duke of Sandringham will help lift the price from his head, while Claire attempts to save an abandoned child.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and Geillis are on trial for witchcraft, while Jamie manages to rescue Claire.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Reunited, Claire and Jamie make their way to Lallybroch, Jamie's family home.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie finds himself between a rock and a hard place when a redcoat deserter from his past resurfaces.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and Jenny set out to rescue Jaime from his redcoat captors. However, when Murtagh joins up, they turn to unorthodox tactics to send word to Jaime.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jaime awaits his death sentence at Wentworth Prison, while Claire and the Highlanders search for a rescue plan.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: A desperate plan manages to free Jaime, but his wounds are more than just physical. At a nearby monastery, Claire attempts to save both Jamie's heart and soul, as his mind lingers on the torture.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire must reconcile her future with the life and love she left behind. Shifting back to 18th century, Jamie, Claire, and Murtagh arrive on the shores of France.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Life in Paris is not without its trials as Jamie struggles to triumph over the traumas of his past.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie's days and nights are dominated by political machinations, while Claire finds solace in her healing skills.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and Jamie throw an elaborate dinner party intended to derail investors in Prince Charles' war effort. Meanwhile, Claire reveals to Jamie that Jack Randall is alive.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Reunited, Jamie and Claire attempt to extinguish the fires their dinner party ignited but their relationship is put to the ultimate test when the past rears its ugly head.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie and Claire devise a scheme to stop a wine deal which could fill the Prince's war chest. When Claire learns Jamie has gone back on his word, the couple are met with dire consequences.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire is brought to L'Hopital Des Anges where doctors try to save her life and that of her unborn baby. King Louis asks Claire to judge two men accused of practising the dark arts - one an enemy, one a friend.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and Jamie call upon Jamie's grandsire, Lord Lovat, in an attempt to elicit support for the Jacobite cause.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and Jamie reunite with the Lallybroch and MacKenzie men during training. Meanwhile, an Englishman arrives in camp with new information.

programme.desc: Claire and Jamie reunite with the Lallybroch and MacKenzie men during training. Meanwhile, an Englishman arrives in camp with new information.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Trusting in Claire's knowledge of 'history', Jamie leads the Jacobite army into a critical battle with British opposition near the town of Preston.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and the Highlanders are sent north after the Jacobite leaders decide to halt their march on London. A band of redcoats makes trouble for the Scots, leading to a most unexpected reunion for Claire.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: As Jamie puts all of his efforts into turning the Jacobite army away from the impending slaughter at Culloden Moor, Claire attempts to comfort the sick Alex Randall.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Flashing forward to 1968, Claire reveals the truth about her parentage to her daughter. Back in the 18th century, the day of the Battle of Culloden has arrived.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: After living through the Battle of Culloden, Jamie is at the mercy of British victors, until his past provides his only hope of survival. Meanwhile, Claire attempts to adjust to life in 1940s Boston.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie leads a lonely life until Lallybroch is threatened by redcoats pursing the elusive Jacobite traitor. In Boston, Claire and Frank struggle to co-exist in a marriage haunted by the ghost of Jamie.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: In prison, Jamie discovers that an old foe has become the warden and has the power to make his life hell. Claire and Frank both put their best foot forward in marriage.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: While serving as a groomsman at Helwater, Jamie is pulled into the intrigue of a British family. In 1968, Claire, Brianna and Roger struggle to trace Jamie's whereabouts.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Brianna grapples with life-changing revelations and Claire must help her come to terms with the fact that she is her father's daughter. Roger brings news that forces Claire and Brianna to face a choice.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: After decades apart, Jamie and Claire finally reunite and rekindle their emotional and physical bonds, but Jamie's new business dealings jeopardise the couple's hopes for a simple life together.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire follows her conscience as a surgeon, even though it could put her and Jamie's lives at risk. Jamie attempts to evade the reach of the Crown as its representative closes in on his illegal dealings.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire returns to Lallybroch with Jamie, where she does not receive quite the reception she was expecting. Unbeknown to her, Jamie's made some choices in their time apart which come back to haunt them.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and Jamie leave Scotland, sailing to the West Indies on an urgent quest. When the superstitious crew looks for someone to blame after a string of bad luck, rescue comes from an unlikely source.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire races to discover the source of an epidemic aboard a disease-stricken ship. Jamie locks horns with Captain Raines. Fergus finds himself torn between loyalty and love.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: After a leap of faith, Claire washes up on an island where survival is her only option. Navigating treacherous waters cripples the Artemis, so Jamie devises a joyful moment for his crew in the midst of setbacks.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: The Artemis finally reaches Jamaica, bringing Jamie and Claire closer to their goal. During a ball on the island, the Fraser's encounter old allies and former adversaries who threaten to derail their mission.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire is forced to play a game of cat and mouse with an old adversary as she searches for Young Ian. The Frasers race through the jungles of Jamaica to prevent the unthinkable.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie and Claire search for a place to call home. Meanwhile, in the 20th-century, Brianna and Roger's romance heats up and then fizzles during a road trip that winds up highlighting their differences.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Having been led by providence to Fraser's Ridge, Jamie, Claire and Young Ian begin to build a home in the Blue Ridge Mountains. In the 20th century, Roger tries to reconnect with Brianna.

programme.desc: Claire's medical expertise proves invaluable, but she begins to fear for her life when tragedy strikes her patients' household. Jamie and Young Ian travel to a nearby town to recruit settlers for Fraser's Ridge.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie and Claire are surprised when Lord John Grey drops in on Fraser's Ridge with an unexpected companion; when Grey takes ill, Claire must reconcile her personal feelings with her duties as a doctor.
